citations.narrative:
The research facility moved to a new location in July of 2025 and did not notify APHIS with the change of address within
10 days after making such change. Failure to notify APHIS of changes in operation can lead to delays in inspections and
communication of important information and updates. A research facility shall notify the Deputy Administrator in writing of
any change in the name, address, or ownership, or other change in operations affecting its status as a research facility,
within 10 days after making such change. The Notification of Change form (APHIS Form 7033) may be used to provide
the information.
To be corrected from this day forward, April 30, 2026
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the facility representative.
n

narrative:
2.30(c) 
   
Registration. 
The research facility moved to a new location in July of 2025 and did not notify APHIS with the change of address within 
10 days after making such change. Failure to notify APHIS of changes in operation can lead to delays in inspections and 
communication of important information and updates. A research facility shall notify the Deputy Administrator in writing of 
any change in the name, address, or ownership, or other change in operations affecting its status as a research facility, 
within 10 days after making such change. The Notification of Change form (APHIS Form 7033) may be used to provide 
the information. 
To be corrected from this day forward, April 30, 2026 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the facility representative.
